description: An analyst needs to analyze open-ended responses from a recent customer satisfaction survey to identify common themes.

nodes.task_description: Export the survey responses, focusing on the open-ended feedback question.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has a list of all the text responses.

nodes.task_description: Use natural language processing (NLP) to perform sentiment analysis and topic modeling on the responses.

expected_outcome.value: The tool categorizes responses as positive/negative/neutral and identifies key topics like 'price', 'customer service', and 'shipping speed'.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the findings in a report, highlighting the most common points of praise and complaint.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a report that clearly summarizes the qualitative feedback.
